name: promptlab
description: npm deps for Flowbite + Tailwind v4 (tailwindcss-rails). Run: npm install

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p app/assets/vendor/flowbite public/flowbite && cp node_modules/flowbite/dist/flowbite.turbo.min.js app/assets/vendor/flowbite/flowbite.turbo.min.js && cp node_modules/flowbite/dist/flowbite.turbo.min.js public/flowbite/flowbite.turbo.min.js
